qrList.label: 🔖 Set Save Point
qrList.title: Lock the current point as the Return-by-Death checkpoint
qrList.message:
/setvar key=rbd_save {{lastMessageId}} |
/echo severity=success 🔖 Save Point locked at message #{{getvar::rbd_save}}. Return by Death will rewind here.

qrList.label: ☠ Return by Death
qrList.title: Confirm, then rewind to the Save Point; loop memory is auto-captured from the [RZMEM] marker
qrList.message:
/buttons labels=["↺ Return to Save Point","Cancel"] Return by Death — rewind the world to your last Save Point? The world and every NPC reset; only you keep the memory. |
/if left={{pipe}} rule=eq right=Cancel {: /abort :} |
/addvar key=rbd_deaths 1 |
/comment Auto-capture this loop's memory from the AI's [RZMEM|...] marker, if present. |
/if left=[RZMEM rule=in right={{lastMessage}} {:
  /regex name="RZ Extract Memory" {{lastMessage}} |
  /setvar key=rbd_memory {{pipe}} 
:} |
/flushinject rbd |
/inject id=rbd position=chat depth=2 scan=on [RETURN BY DEATH is active. This is loop #{{getvar::rbd_deaths}}. {{user}} alone retains memory of every timeline that has already ended; the world and all NPCs have reset to the Save Point and remember none of it. Knowledge {{user}} carries into this loop: {{getvar::rbd_memory}}] |
/add {{getvar::rbd_save}} 1 |
/cut {{pipe}}-{{lastMessageId}} |
/sys The Witch's shadow coils around your heart. Time rewinds — the world snaps back to the Save Point, and only you remember what is to come.

qrList.label: 📖 Loop Memory
qrList.title: View what you currently carry across loops
qrList.message:
/popup title="Return by Death — Loop Memory" Loop #{{getvar::rbd_deaths}}

{{getvar::rbd_memory}}

qrList.label: 🧹 Clear Memory
qrList.title: Reset loop memory, death count, and save point
qrList.message:
/buttons labels=["Clear all","Cancel"] Reset Return by Death — clear loop memory, death count, and save point? |
/if left={{pipe}} rule=eq right=Cancel {: /abort :} |
/flushinject rbd |
/setvar key=rbd_memory  |
/setvar key=rbd_deaths 0 |
/flushvar rbd_save |
/echo severity=success Return by Death state cleared.
